_ruleNotes.COR001: Inline objects OK — K8s composite props are simple and readable inline
_ruleNotes.COR004: Unused exports expected — resources are consumed by serializers, not same-file refs
_ruleNotes.COR009: File count limit too strict for multi-resource VPN/cluster configs
_ruleNotes.COR013: Mixed resource/config acceptable — VPN configs are tightly coupled to their resources
_ruleNotes.EVL001: Dynamic env var lookups required for VPN IP two-pass build pattern
_ruleNotes.EVL004: Spread from shared config (CRDB_CLUSTER) is safe and traceable
_ruleNotes.WAW001: Hardcoded regions intentional — this is a fixed 3-region deployment
_ruleNotes.WK8001: Hardcoded namespaces intentional — each cloud has a dedicated namespace
